title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROSARIO, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1653 / 55 OG No. 39, 8256 (September 28, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2554, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROSARIO, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. The sitios of Lumbangan, Cantarilya and Makukak in the Municipality of Rosario, Province of Batangas, are constituted into a district and independent barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Lumbangan.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
